data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Flexsys/
data.description: Flexsys has announced a price hike for insoluble sulfur in India, effective immediately. The company clarified that the earlier information distributed by PR Newswire was inaccurate. The revised announcement, issued on April 22, 2026, highlighted the increase in prices impacting the market. The correction emphasized the accurate pricing structure to avoid any confusion. This adjustment will impact all relevant stakeholders in the industry, with the specific price increments detailed in the corrected release. Flexsys, as a leading supplier, aims to maintain transparency and clarity in its pricing strategies to ensure a fair market environment.

data.title: SAP Shares Climb After Mixed Q1 Report: Details
data.description: SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) released its first-quarter earnings report after Thursday's market close, surpassing analysts' expectations. The company reported quarterly earnings of $2.01 per share, beating the consensus estimate of $1.92 by 4.69%. Despite falling slightly short of the Street's forecast of $11.26 billion, SAP's revenue for the quarter stood at $11.19 billion, marking an increase from $9.48 billion in the previous year's quarter. Noteworthy highlights of the report include a current cloud backlog of €21.9 billion ($25,586,865,000), showcasing a 20% growth. For more detailed information, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com. SAP stock's performance is also worth monitoring for market developments.
Intel is insane… This is a massive earnings surprise. $INTC

data.title: Agomab Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Confirms 2026 Outlook
data.description: Today, Agomab Therapeutics NV announced its financial results for the fiscal year ended on December 31, 2025, while also reaffirming its projections for 2026. The company disclosed key figures indicating its financial performance for the specified period, as well as providing insights into its plans and expectations moving forward.

data.description: This press release is considered a "designated news release" for the Company's prospectus supplement dated August 8, 2024, related to its short form base shelf prospectus dated August 7, 2024.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stocks Fall On Iran, ServiceNow, Tesla; Intel Soars Late
data.description: Stock prices experienced a decline amidst news related to Iran, ServiceNow, and Tesla. Additionally, AI entities Intel and Comfort Systems disclosed their earnings later than usual. Dow Jones Futures observed a drop due to these developments. Intel exhibited a notable upsurge following the news.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls As Iran Tensions Flare, Meta Slammed; Utility Breaks Out Again (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following a surprising increase in jobless claims. Additionally, Tesla stock saw a decrease in value due to remarks made by Elon Musk. The stock market faced further challenges as tensions escalated in Iran, leading to a drop in Meta stock prices. On a positive note, the utility sector showed strong performance once again. This live coverage highlights the latest developments in the stock market, with the Dow falling and various companies facing volatility.

data.title: ReCo Anywhere, Powered by 100GROUP, Is Modernizing Payment Processing for Higher Education Without Disrupting the Systems Institutions Already Rely On
data.description: A payment processing system called ReCo Anywhere is now available for colleges and universities across the United States. This system allows for smooth transactions across multiple departments within educational institutions.

data.title: Agam Capital and 1823 Partners Announce Strategic Partnership to Provide Life Insurers with an End-to-End Value Chain Solution
data.description: Agam Capital and 1823 Partners (US) LLC have come together in a strategic collaboration to cater to worldwide insurance firms. Agam Capital specializes in insurance asset and liability analytics while 1823 Partners focuses on unique asset management for insurance-based investments. This partnership aims to provide global insurance companies with opportunities for permanent capital access via reinsurance. This will be available to non-US insurers seeking in-force risk transfer or capital solutions, as well as co-creation options.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- CAKES/
data.description: CAKES Body has announced significant progress in their "Childcare 2.0" initiative through an Industry Summit and implementation of an Open-Source Policy aimed at reshaping the future of work. The update was shared on 23-Apr-2026 by CAKES via PR Newswire. This development marks a pivotal moment for the company as they redefine workplace strategies.

data.title: Rauw Alejandro and Buchanan's Scotch Whisky Mark a Milestone for Music, Celebration and the FIFA World Cup 2026™ Countdown, Debuting a First-of-Its-Kind Song and Music Video, 'Dando Vueltas.'
data.description: Buchanan's Blended Scotch Whisky began its global celebration of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ by debuting 'Dando Vueltas' live in New York City. The event attracted numerous fans who gathered to toast to unity and shared experiences across the Americas. The track 'Dando Vueltas' by Rauw Alejandro was streamed during the event, which marked the start of the festivities.

data.title: 36 Years of Service, One Clear Choice: Erik Pacheco Enters the Final Stretch of the Christian County Sheriff's Race with Momentum and a Message
data.description: In the upcoming May 19 Republican Primary, Erik Pacheco, a veteran and law enforcement officer, has announced his candidacy for Christian County Sheriff in Hopkinsville, Kentucky.

data.title: Kane Biotech Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Kane Biotech Inc., headquartered in Winnipeg, Manitoba, released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The Company, listed on the TSX-V as KNE, revealed the performance metrics for the mentioned periods.

data.title: Historic Artworks Receive Funding through BofA's Art Conservation Project™
data.description: In a demonstration of global dedication to art conservation, the 2026 Art Conservation Project™ has announced selections across 10 countries. Bank of America is granting 18 Art Conservation Project™ awards to safeguard important artworks this year. The selected projects in 2026 encompass the conservation of significant pieces from various nations.

data.title: Hisense Partners with Terry Crews to Launch 'Out Host with Hisense' Campaign, Addressing the Rise of At-Home Viewing Parties
data.description: A recent report reveals that 60% of Americans prefer to watch major events from the comfort of their homes. In light of this trend, an integrated marketing campaign has been launched, featuring a well-known actor and TV personality as the "Ultimate Host" to enhance the home entertainment experience. This initiative comes ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, which is expected to captivate homes across the U.S. The campaign aims to tap into the growing trend of home viewing and elevate the experience for viewers, reflecting the changing preferences of the audience.

data.title: Ontario International Airport passenger volumes rose for 4th straight month in March while freight shipments grew by 15%
data.description: During the first quarter of 2026 in Ontario, California, the SoCal gateway experienced a 4% rise in passenger traffic and a significant 12.7% increase in freight activity. Specifically, Ontario International Airport (ONT) saw a rise in passenger volumes for the fourth consecutive month in March. This growth indicates a positive trend in both passenger and freight sectors, with the airport serving more travelers and handling higher volumes of commercial air shipments. The increase in passenger traffic and freight activity demonstrates the airport's growing importance and economic impact in the region.
